etymology.notes: mlḥ. Cf. SL 766 mlḥ (I): to sprinkle salt; Cf. also SL 767 melḥā which is probably better, because the verb is in the second stem?

Infectum-wa.turoyo: Saymiwa qaliyat w kəsdiwo u baṣro, mmalḥiwole, tulanwole bad dane qaliyat and pickle (?) the meat, salt it and then put it in containers'
